violations.description: HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): The hand washing lavatory in the food prep area noted being used for other than hand washing. Employee noted having been dumping their drink in the hand sink.
DISHWASHING FACILITIES (2 pts): Sanitizer test kit noted not provided.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Ceiling around vent covers vent covers some wall areas and floors in the kitchen noted in need of cleaning. Floor around broaster noted in need of repair.
